import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut sep = -1
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if sep < 0 and (b == 32 or b == 9)
      sep = i
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if sep < 0
    Err("invalid input")
  else
    let a_str = string.substring(line, 0, sep)
    let b_str = string.trim(string.substring(line, sep, n))
    let a_opt = string.parse_int(a_str)
    let b_opt = string.parse_int(b_str)
    match a_opt
    when Some(a)
      match b_opt
      when Some(b)
        mut x = a
        mut y = b
        while y != 0
          let t = y
          y = x % y
          x = t
        end
        println("gcd=#{x}")
        Ok(())
      when None
        Err("parse b")
      end
    when None
      Err("parse a")
    end
  end
end
